overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through an abandoned frontier settlement at night. The character traverses open grassland and dilapidated wooden ruins under a clear starry sky, briefly encountering a horseback rider before exploring the derelict interior of the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie approaching abandoned frontier settlement

events.description: horseback rider passes by on the right side moving leftward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the abandoned settlement, wearing a cowboy hat and dark coat

notable_agents.action: riding a horse past the ego character from right to left

entered.detail: dark mountain silhouette on the horizon under a starry sky
group of evergreen trees on the left hillside
weathered vertical wooden posts marking property lines
small dilapidated wooden building with slanted roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open grassland at night, approaching the outskirts of an abandoned settlement. A horseback rider passes by on the right, heading in the opposite direction. Wooden fence posts and a small shack become visible in the distance as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of abandoned settlement with collapsed wooden structures

events.description: entering the dense ruin area with prominent windmill and collapsed barn visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered ruins, stepping over broken planks and weaving between fence posts

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with rotating blades against the night sky
large collapsed wooden barn with caved-in roof and broken walls
broken wooden boards and rubble strewn across the ground
weathered dead tree trunks and stumps

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the abandoned settlement, the character walks among dilapidated wooden fences and ruins. A windmill stands prominently on the left while a large collapsed barn dominates the center view. The ground becomes more cluttered with debris and broken planks as the character progresses through the derelict frontier outpost.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, starry grassland into the decaying heart of an abandoned frontier settlement. It begins with the character walking through wide fields at night, passing a horseback rider who travels in the opposite direction as the first signs of wooden fence posts and a distant shack emerge. As the character moves forward, the open terrain shifts into a cluttered outpost where the camera glides past dilapidated fences and weathered ruins. The scene then expands to reveal a prominent windmill on the left and a large collapsed barn dominating the center view. Finally, the path becomes increasingly strewn with debris and broken planks as the camera pushes deeper into the derelict ruins.
